Professional Boat Maintenance in Malaga & Marbella

We take care of your vessel as if it were our own. Comprehensive inspection, cleaning, and tuning services in the Mediterranean.

  1. Home
  2. Maintenance

Nautical Services

Your boat always Ready to sail

At Rumbomed, we understand that your time should be spent enjoying the sea, not worrying about mechanics or cleaning. That is why we offer a comprehensive nautical maintenance service in Malaga, Marbella, and Estepona, ensuring your vessel is in perfect condition 365 days a year.

Our team specializes in high-end yacht care, providing personalized solutions for every type of boat, from small motorboats to large sailing vessels.

Technical Inspection

Marine engine checks, electrical systems, and fluid levels. Preventive maintenance to avoid costly breakdowns during your journey.

Cleaning & Detailing

Deep hull and deck cleaning, stainless steel polishing, and upholstery care using high-quality marine products for Mediterranean conditions.

Winterizing & Storage

Professional boat storage and protection during the off-season. When the season arrives, all you have to do is cast off and enjoy.

Request a Maintenance Quote

Tell us about your boat and its location, and we will prepare a customized maintenance plan for you.

Contact Our Team

Over 15 years creating unforgettable nautical experiences on the Costa del Sol.
